title: StyleSelector
description: Maps tag/geometry conditions to styleIDs. All matching selectors are applied, sorted by weight.

styleIDs.description: Array of styleIDs to apply when matched (applies in order, later overrides earlier).

weight.description: Weight of this style selector - default is 1.0

geometry.description: Geometry type(s) to match, or '*' for all.

tags.description: Array of PropMatcher rules. All must match (AND logic).
